name: Ashot Ashkelon Industries Ltd.
summary: Ashot Ashkelon Industries Ltd. develops, manufactures, assembles, and supplies systems and components for the aerospace, defense, automotive, and other industries in Israel and internationally. It offers aerospace products, such as long and short shafts for turbofan and turboprop jet engines; high lift system components, including universal joints, transmissions and gearboxes, shafts, and extension joints; landing gears components; electromechanical assemblies for aircraft; gearboxes, transmissions, and gear-based products; and tungsten weights. The company also provides automatic transmissions, final drives, transfer boxes, drop boxes, PTO's, and a range of gear based assemblies and shafts for main battle tanks; and off-road vehicle products comprising automatic transmissions, hydraulic and mechanical power take off units, transmission range shafts, planetary systems, clutch independent drives, mass transit gearboxes, drive axles, final drives, oil pumps, reduction and transfer boxes, and gear assemblies. In addition, it offers tungsten-based heavy metal products for applications in aircraft and instrument balance weights, helicopter rotor dampers, aircraft and land-based gyro components, airborne antenna bases, propeller and blade balancing, X-ray and radiation therapy shields, industrial shields for irradiation systems, armor piercing penetrators, fragmentation parts, radar balancing, tool holders, and oil and gas liners. The company is based in Ashkelon, Israel. Ashot Ashkelon Industries Ltd. is a subsidiary of Israel Military Industries Ltd.
